problems_encountered.description: Tool would upgrade production app version. Upgrading the existing PHP app could potentially cause compatibility issues or breaking changes. Skipped to avoid impacting production application.

tool_response_summary: Tool not executed - would perform version upgrade on production app
execution_notes: Tool would upgrade app to a newer version. Prerequisites met (app exists, no upgrade candidates available for this custom PHP app). Skipped execution to avoid potential breaking changes or compatibility issues in production environment. Tool interface and parameters validated.
